text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess has invited me to visit a shrine
for New Year's.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You're praying very passionately.
You're praying very passionately.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I've decided that this is the year I'll
conduct myself in a way truly befitting a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll be the princess-iest princess to ever princess!
choice_data_list: Don't you think you're going a tad too far?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
N-no, not at all. What I aspire to become is my
perfect self—true to both my princess ideals and
my own nature!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I won't go back to the days of simply imitating
princess behavior. And I won't be doing things
like elegance training any longer either.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What I lacked was dignity as a runner. A selfish
princess who just does whatever she wants is
nothing but an embarrassment.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I want to be accepted for who I am. I need to
adopt a mental attitude that everyone will
respect.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Fan
text_block_list.text:
It's Kawakami Princess! I can't wait to see you run
in the Kinko Sho!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you very much. I appreciate your
support!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Fan
text_block_list.text:
You were so amazing in the Classics last year,
too! You really stood out among your peers.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...No, that can't be the case. I still have so much
to learn from everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oho... ohohoho... My apologies, but I should be
off now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So saying, Kawakami Princess gently raises her
skirt and lifts her right foot, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: KA-SPLAAAT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She slips and falls over stupendously.
choice_data_list: Are you all right?!
Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm terribly sorry! I have no injuries, so please do
not concern yourself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Are you really okay?! There's a first-aid room
right nearby!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I'm really fine! A g-good day to you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Kawakami, what are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll pass on the amazake... I still haven't mastered
the proper etiquette required when drinking it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, be careful, Trainer! There's a cat walking
past. Let's pass through once it's gone.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You don't seem quite like yourself today.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Th-that's because I decided to change!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I realized I can't continue being the same person I
was until now.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Is it that time already?! I won't make it to my
flower arrangement class!
choice_data_list: You're learning to do flower arrangements now?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I started last month. It's very graceful... And
queen-like, wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's a soccer ball...

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! Would you mind kicking the ball back to
me?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, that's my specialty! You'd better back up
a bit! I'm about to send this—

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Isn't that Kawakami Princess? She was on the TV
recently...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right. She made that princess declaration,
right? Said she wouldn't do anything undignified...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I'll just carry the ball over to you.
Please wait just a moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess gently picks up the soccer
ball.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's holding herself back. As she
begins walking over, I feel compelled to say...
choice_data_list: I don't want you to force yourself.
I don't want you to force yourself.
Hey, kid. Let us join your soccer game!
Hey, kid. Let us join your soccer game!
Pass me the ball. This kick is going to be sick.
Pass me the ball. This kick is going to be sick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's holding herself back. As she
begins walking over, I feel compelled to say...
choice_data_list: I don't want you to force yourself.
I don't want you to force yourself.
Hey, kid. Let us join your soccer game!
Hey, kid. Let us join your soccer game!
Pass me the ball. This kick is going to be sick.
Pass me the ball. This kick is going to be sick.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I gently take the ball from Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No, I... I'm not forcing anything...
choice_data_list:
You don't need to become the perfect princess
all at once. Just take things one step at a time.

You don't need to become the perfect princess
all at once. Just take things one step at a time.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: One step at a time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk along the riverbank with Kawakami Princess
as the evening sun sets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if this path we're on doesn't end up leading
to her goal, all we have to do is pick another one
when that time comes.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What? Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Kawakami Princess's hand and run over to
the boys playing soccer.

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Wow! You two are pretty good at this!
choice_data_list: I had a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yes, so did I...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It was... very enjoyable.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Trainer?
choice_data_list: Check this out!
Check this out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the ball from Kawakami Princess and pull
my leg back as far as I can. Then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swish!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! You completely whiffed it...
choice_data_list: Well, that was embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... You packed way too much energy into
it. Just what were you thinking?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at Kawakami Princess's face and see her
usual authentic smile.
